contact.pageDescription: Get in touch with us for your questions, suggestions or contributions. We are happy to help you.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully! We will get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.errorNotConfigured: Email service is not currently configured. Please contact the site administrator.
contact.faqDescription: Answers to your questions may be found in the FAQ section.
contact.socialMediaDescription: Follow us for updates and announcements:
contact.helpDescription: As part of the Islamic Library community, we are here to provide you with the best service.
contact.help1Desc: You can suggest books you would like to add to our library.
contact.help2Desc: Share your suggestions to improve the platform.
contact.help3Desc: Support us in translation, editing and development.

about.pageDescription: Islamic Library is a free electronic library platform created to make religious books accessible in digital format.
about.missionText1: Our primary mission is to make valuable works in the field of Islamic sciences available to society in digital format and contribute to the spread of Islamic culture and science.
about.missionText2: We make quality resources freely accessible on the Quran, hadith, tafsir, Sufism and other Islamic topics.
about.visionText1: We aim to be the most comprehensive digital Islamic library where Muslims from all over the world can easily access Islamic knowledge.
about.visionText2: We work to pass on valuable heritage to future generations by combining technology with Islamic science.
about.feature1Desc: We serve in 4 languages: Turkish, English, Russian and Azerbaijani.
about.feature2Desc: We offer the ability to download books in PDF, EPUB and DOC formats and read them online.
about.feature3Desc: We provide completely free access to all our books, we do not charge any fees.
about.feature4Desc: We are constantly evolving with user feedback and producing solutions tailored to needs.
about.feature5Desc: We offer quality Islamic works from reliable sources and expert-reviewed.
about.feature6Desc: We regularly add new books and keep existing content up to date.

usefulInfo.pageDescription: Guides, tips and frequently asked questions to help you use the Islamic Library platform more efficiently.
usefulInfo.guide1Desc: Steps to download books from the platform
usefulInfo.guide1Step1: 1. Click on the book you want
usefulInfo.guide1Step2: 2. Select format on book detail page (PDF, EPUB, DOC)
usefulInfo.guide1Step4: 4. The file will be downloaded automatically
usefulInfo.guide2Desc: How to use the online reading feature
usefulInfo.guide2Step1: 1. Click 'Read Online' button on the book card
usefulInfo.guide2Step3: 3. You can jump to any page with page number
usefulInfo.guide2Step4: 4. Adjust text size with zoom feature
usefulInfo.guide3Desc: Methods to find the books you're looking for faster
usefulInfo.guide3Step1: • You can search by author name
usefulInfo.guide3Step2: • Search by typing part of the book title
usefulInfo.guide4Desc: Recommendations for better experience on your mobile devices
usefulInfo.guide4Step2: • You can add shortcut to home screen
usefulInfo.faq1Answer: Yes, all books on our platform are completely free. We do not charge any fees.
usefulInfo.faq2Question: Which formats are available for download?
usefulInfo.faq2Answer: You can download books in PDF, EPUB and DOC formats. Available formats for each book are specified on the book detail page.
usefulInfo.faq3Answer: Yes, you can read books without internet connection after downloading them. The online reading feature requires an internet connection.
usefulInfo.faq4Answer: The platform interface supports Turkish, English, Russian and Azerbaijani languages. You can change it from the language menu in the upper right.
usefulInfo.pdfRecommended: Recommended for computer and tablet use
usefulInfo.epubRecommended: Ideal for e-book readers and mobile devices

footer.description: Download and read religious books online for free
footer.detailedDescription: Download thousands of Islamic books for free, read online, and expand your knowledge. The platform where modern technology meets traditional wisdom.
